privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real landscape image downloaded from Unsplash (or a synthetic 800x600 fallback generated via ImageMagick if the download fails). The verifier explicitly checks the upper-left quadrant (top 50% height, left 50% width) of the exported image. To pass, the pattern applied must be highly textured (color standard deviation > 25.0 in the quadrant) and significantly different from the original (mean difference > 30.0 and at least 10,000 modified pixels in the quadrant). Additionally, at least 2% of the overall image's pixels must be changed compared to the original.
